title: Beehiiv vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: Beehiiv vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Both Beehiiv and Constant Contact are established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators and media operators with monetization features, while Constant Contact targets small businesses, nonprofits, and local organizations. Understanding their differences will help you choose the platform that aligns with your specific goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: E-commerce, SMS, and social media ads

choose_a_if: You want to monetize your newsletter through sponsorships and ads
You're starting out and need a free tier with up to 2,500 subscribers
You prioritize analytics and audience segmentation for content creators
choose_b_if: You need e-commerce integration for selling products
SMS marketing and social media ads are essential to your strategy
You want comprehensive features built-in without a learning curve

faq.q: Is Beehiiv better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers seeking monetization and has higher user satisfaction ratings (4.7 vs 4.0 on G2). Constant Contact is better for small businesses and nonprofits that need e-commerce, SMS, and social media marketing features integrated into one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper if you're just starting out, offering a free tier for up to 2,500 subscribers with no credit card required. Constant Contact starts at $12/month with no free option. However, Beehiiv's paid plans begin at $39/month, so costs depend on your subscriber count and feature needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list imports, making migration straightforward. You can export your contacts from Constant Contact and import them into Beehiiv. However, you'll need to rebuild any advanced automation workflows, as the platforms have different architecture and feature sets.
